title: Beehiiv vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool fits your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: Beehiiv and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv targets newsletter publishers seeking growth and monetization opportunities, while Campaign Monitor focuses on agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your specific needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium (Free up to 2,500 subscribers, paid from $39/month)
comparison_table.tool_b: Paid only (Starts at $11/month, no free tier)

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter publishers and independent media operators
comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies and teams managing multiple client brands

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program, web reader
comparison_table.tool_b: Multi-brand management, journey designer, transactional email, template builder

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher or independent media creator looking to monetize your audience
You want a free tier to start without upfront costs (up to 2,500 subscribers)
You value growth features like referral programs and built-in ad networks
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts and need multi-brand management
You need advanced automation with journey designer and transactional email capabilities
You're an agency requiring professional email templates and team collaboration tools

faq.q: Is Beehiiv better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for individual newsletter publishers with growth and monetization features, earning higher ratings (4.7 vs 4.1 on G2). Campaign Monitor is better suited for agencies managing multiple brands with its multi-brand management and automation tools. Choose based on your specific business model.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Beehiiv offers a free tier supporting up to 2,500 subscribers, making it cheaper to start with no upfront investment. Campaign Monitor has no free tier but starts at $11/month. For small publishers, Beehiiv's freemium model provides better value; for agencies, Campaign Monitor's starting price is competitive.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports. Most email marketing tools allow CSV imports of subscriber data. However, you may lose some Campaign Monitor-specific customizations like journey automation. Plan your migration carefully and test with a small segment first.
